sources.humanApprovals: Dynamic Prefix profile review and owner-approved morphology/teaching ages

D4_MOR_PREFIXES_DIS_MIS.label: dis- and mis-
bins: dis- means not or the opposite
D4_MOR_PREFIXES_DIS_MIS.reflection: How did dis- and mis- change the meaning of the base word?

D4_MOR_PREFIXES_IN_IM_IL_IR.label: in-, im-, il- and ir-
D4_MOR_PREFIXES_IN_IM_IL_IR.reflection: Which form of the ‘not’ prefix did each base word need?

D4_MOR_PREFIXES_RE_PRE.label: re- and pre-
D4_MOR_PREFIXES_RE_PRE.reflection: When did the prefix mean ‘again/back’, and when did it mean ‘before’?

D4_MOR_PREFIXES_SUB_INTER_SUPER.label: sub-, inter- and super-
D4_MOR_PREFIXES_SUB_INTER_SUPER.reflection: What position or amount did each longer prefix add?

pronunciation.cmu: D IH0 S AH0 G R IY1

dictation.sentence: They disagree about the game.
dictation.audioText: They disagree about the game.

pronunciation.cmu: D IH2 S AH0 P IH1 R

dictation.sentence: The rabbit can disappear behind the hedge.
dictation.audioText: The rabbit can disappear behind the hedge.

teaching.baseMeaning: tell the truth and do what is right

pronunciation.cmu: D IH0 S AA1 N AH0 S T

dictation.sentence: It is dishonest to tell a lie.
dictation.audioText: It is dishonest to tell a lie.

trueMorphology.humanApprovedText: Prefix: dis + Base: satisfy + Suffix: ed
trueMorphology.transformationNotes: Change final y to i before adding -ed; keep both s letters where dis and satisfy meet.

teaching.baseMeaning: please or give what is needed

pronunciation.cmu: D IH0 S AE1 T AH0 S F AY2 D

dictation.sentence: She felt dissatisfied with the untidy work.
dictation.audioText: She felt dissatisfied with the untidy work.

pronunciation.cmu: M IH2 S B AH0 HH EY1 V

dictation.sentence: Do not misbehave in the library.
dictation.audioText: Do not misbehave in the library.

pronunciation.cmu: M IH0 S L IY1 D

dictation.sentence: The sign did not mean to mislead us.
dictation.audioText: The sign did not mean to mislead us.

trueMorphology.transformationNotes: Keep both s letters where mis and spell meet.

teaching.baseMeaning: write a word using its letters in the right order

pronunciation.cmu: M IH0 S S P EH1 L

dictation.sentence: Check that you do not misspell the word.
dictation.audioText: Check that you do not misspell the word.

teaching.childFriendlyMeaning: not allowed by law or rules

pronunciation.cmu: IH2 L IY1 G AH0 L

dictation.sentence: Parking there is illegal.
dictation.audioText: Parking there is illegal.

pronunciation.cmu: IH2 M P EY1 SH AH0 N T

dictation.sentence: He grew impatient in the long queue.
dictation.audioText: He grew impatient in the long queue.

teaching.baseMeaning: able to happen or be done
teaching.childFriendlyMeaning: not able to happen or be done

pronunciation.cmu: IH2 M P AA1 S AH0 B AH0 L

dictation.sentence: It is impossible to be in two places at once.
dictation.audioText: It is impossible to be in two places at once.

pronunciation.cmu: IH2 N K ER0 EH1 K T

dictation.sentence: The answer is incorrect.
dictation.audioText: The answer is incorrect.

trueMorphology.humanApprovedText: Prefix: in + Root: vis + Suffix: ible
trueMorphology.transformationNotes: -ible attaches to the bound root vis.

pronunciation.cmu: IH2 N V IH1 Z AH0 B AH0 L

dictation.sentence: The tiny insect was almost invisible.
dictation.audioText: The tiny insect was almost invisible.

teaching.childFriendlyMeaning: not even or following the usual pattern

pronunciation.cmu: IH2 R EH1 G Y AH0 L ER0

dictation.sentence: The shape has an irregular edge.
dictation.audioText: The shape has an irregular edge.

trueMorphology.humanApprovedText: Prefix: ir + Root: respons + Suffix: ible
trueMorphology.transformationNotes: in- becomes ir- before r; -ible attaches to the bound root respons.

pronunciation.cmu: IH2 R AH0 S P AA1 N S AH0 B AH0 L

dictation.sentence: It is irresponsible to leave litter behind.
dictation.audioText: It is irresponsible to leave litter behind.

trueMorphology.transformationNotes: dict is a bound root meaning say.

teaching.childFriendlyMeaning: say what you think will happen

pronunciation.cmu: P R IH0 D IH1 K T

dictation.sentence: Can you predict tomorrow’s weather?
dictation.audioText: Can you predict tomorrow’s weather?

dictation.sentence: Please preheat the oven first.
dictation.audioText: Please preheat the oven first.

trueMorphology.humanApprovedText: Prefix: sub + Base: head + Suffix: ing
